The '''74-Y speeder bike''' was a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] manufactured by the [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech Repulsor Company]] for civilian purposes. Like its [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z]] military relative, for which it was the design basis, the 74-Y was highly maneuverable. The 74-Y was also used at times by Imperial military personnel.

{{Veh-stub}}
